preferred_name: Multichannel radiation thermometer with filter wheel

preferred_name_ml.en: Multichannel radiation thermometer with filter wheel

definition: multichannel radiation thermometer with a single detector in which the radiation is interrupted periodically by a modulator with more than two filters

definition_ml.en: multichannel radiation thermometer with a single detector in which the radiation is interrupted periodically by a modulator with more than two filters
definition_ml.de: Mehrkanal-Strahlungsthermometer mit einem Einzeldetektor, in dem die Strahlung periodisch durch einen Modulator mit mehr als zwei Filtern unterbrochen wird
